_**Agent (copilot/auto)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="run_in_terminal"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **run_in_terminal**</summary>

**Input:**

- command: `$data = Get-Content xreg/usp.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $rows = @(); foreach ($b in $data.blocks) { $instances = @(); foreach ($s in $data.systems) { foreach ($bi in $s.block_instances) { if ($bi.block -eq $b.name -and $null -ne $bi.offset.value) { $instances += [int64]$bi.offset.value } } }; foreach ($r in $b.registers) { $regOffVal = if ($null -ne $r.offset.value) { [int64]$r.offset.value } else { $null }; $addr = ''; if ($null -ne $regOffVal -and $instances.Count -gt 0) { $vals = @(); foreach ($base in $instances) { $vals += ('0x{0:X}' -f ($base + $regOffVal)) }; $addr = ($vals -join '|') }; foreach ($f in $r.fields) { $lsb = if ($null -ne $f.lsb.value) { [int64]$f.lsb.value } else { $null }; $width = if ($null -ne $f.bits.value) { [int64]$f.bits.value } else { $null }; $bit = ''; if ($null -ne $lsb -and $null -ne $width) { if ($width -le 1) { $bit = ('[{0}]' -f $lsb) } else { $msb = $lsb + $width - 1; $bit = ('[{0}:{1}]' -f $msb, $lsb) } }; $def = if ($null -ne $f.reset -and $null -ne $f.reset.raw -and $f.reset.raw -ne '') { $f.reset.raw } else { '0' }; $status = '0'; if ($null -ne $f.volatile) { if ($f.volatile -is [bool]) { $status = $(if ($f.volatile) { '1' } else { '0' }) } elseif ($null -ne $f.volatile.raw) { $status = [string]$f.volatile.raw } elseif ($null -ne $f.volatile.value) { $v = $f.volatile.value; if ($v -is [bool]) { $status = $(if ($v) { '1' } else { '0' }) } else { $status = [string]$v } } }; $rows += [pscustomobject]@{ 'Addr' = $addr; 'Type' = $(if ($null -ne $f.access -and $f.access -ne '') { [string]$f.access } else { 'field' }); 'Field name' = [string]$r.name; 'Register Name' = [string]$f.name; 'Bit' = $bit; 'Default' = $def; 'Description' = ''; 'Status' = $status } } } }; $rows | Export-Csv xreg/register_table.csv -NoTypeInformation -Encoding UTF8; $rows | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String`
- explanation: `Regenerate CSV using the requested column names and mapping rules.`
- goal: `Apply new table format`
- mode: `sync`
- timeout: `120000`

</details></tool-use>

The user wants to refactor the script with clear separation of concerns:
1. Read RALF file
2. Parse RALF file
3. Output functionality

And the output behavior should be:
- Default output format is `--excel`
- Default file names are based on current directory + input filename + extension (e.g., `usp.yaml`, `usp.csv`, `usp.xls`, `usp.json`)
- If `--yaml [filepath]` is specified, use that path; same for others
- Terminal output should only be YAML or JSON (not a table)
- `--excel` is the default output format (so if no args given, generate excel)
